{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = King of Dreams
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Sage]] addressed someone as the [[King of Dreams]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“You seek to violate my mind, King of Dreams?<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
